title: Chickens To Turkey
description: This is mobs for fall seasons, give your world extra little detail.
body:
**Information/Introductions:** I’m a pixel-artist/3d-modeler with 3-4 years of experience, and have a similar art style to Noxcrew and Mojang. If you plan on reusing this assets for your own private or public resource packs is allowed, all I ask is credit must be given where it's due. If you got any questions or sugguestions, put them into the comments, always be checking them!

My Discord Server: https://discord.gg/UgQwjgxDCN
